song.title: He is Exalted
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) He is exalted The King is exalted on high I will praise him He is exalted forever exalted And I will praise His name
[C] Chorus He is the Lord Forever His truth shall reign Heaven and earth rejoice in His holy name He is exalted The King exalted on high
song.author: Twila Paris
